title: misandra strobilantha
side_effects: Misandra strobilantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure to its sap may lead to skin rashes and inflammation. Excessive consumption of the plant's extracts may also result in cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. Furthermore, using Misandra strobilantha without proper medical guidance can interact with other medications and exacerbate underlying health conditions.
